exercises.title: TLS Handshake Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze the TLS 1.3 handshake with hybrid key exchange.
hints: Focus on ClientHello and ServerHello key_share extensions

exercises.title: Size Impact Study
exercises.description: Measure the complete impact of hybrid on TLS connections.
hints: Include both directions of the handshake

exercises.title: Server Configuration
exercises.description: Create server configuration for hybrid TLS deployment.
hints: Prefer hybrid but support classical fallback

exercises.title: Performance Testing
exercises.description: Design performance tests for hybrid TLS deployment.
